message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title 布局树构建与更新流程

participant "Application" as App
participant "Node" as Node
participant "Composed_VStack" as CVStack
participant "VStack" as VStack
participant "State" as State
participant "NodeBuilder" as Builder
participant "Control.Layer" as Control
participant "Renderer" as Renderer

== 布局树构建过程 ==

App -> Node: build
activate Node
Node -> CVStack: buildNode
activate CVStack
CVStack -> VStack: setupStateProperties
CVStack -> VStack: setupEnvironmentProperties
CVStack -> Node: addNode
deactivate CVStack

alt [LayoutRoot]
    Node -> VStack: loadData
end alt

deactivate Node

== 布局更新构建过程 ==

State -> State: set
State -> App: invalidateNode
activate App
App -> App: scheduleUpdate
App -> App: update
App -> Node: update
activate Node
Node -> Builder: updateNode
activate Builder
Builder -> Control: invalidate
deactivate Builder
deactivate Node
App -> Renderer: update

@enduml
```
